pattern: Bit manipulation: keep all set bits of x fixed and fill the zero-bit positions of x with the bits of (n-1) to make the array as small as possible.
hints: Every element must AND to x, so all bits set in x must remain set in every element. The 'free' bit positions are those that are 0 in x.
The minimum strictly increasing array with AND equal to x starts at x and occupies free bit positions with successive counter values. Spread the bits of (n-1) into the zero-bit positions of x.
Iterate through bits of x: for each 0-bit in x, take the next bit from (n-1) and place it in that position of the result, then OR in x itself at the end.

edge_inputs.description: n=1 any x - result is x itself
x is all ones - no free bits so result is x + (n-1)*2^k
x has sparse bits requiring bit-spreading

stress.description: random n (capped at 1000 for oracle) and x within constraints
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, size)
    x = rng.randint(1, 100000000)
    return [n, x]
